results.question: Wer war Trainer der Heilbronner Falken in der Saison 2023/24?
results.actual_answer: Trainer der Heilbronner Falken in der Saison 2023/24 war Francesco Petrozza.
results.sql: SELECT c.name, ct.role, ct.start_date, ct.end_date FROM coach_tenures ct JOIN coaches c ON c.id = ct.coach_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = ct.team_id JOIN seasons s ON ct.start_date <= s.end_date AND ct.end_date >= s.start_date WHERE t.name = 'Heilbronner Falken' AND s.label = '2023/24' AND ct.role = 'Headcoach';

results.question: Wer war Trainer der Heilbronner Falken in der Saison 2022/23?
results.actual_answer: Trainer der Heilbronner Falken in der Saison 2022/23 waren Jason Morgan und Martin Jiranek.
results.sql: SELECT c.name, ct.role, ct.start_date, ct.end_date FROM coach_tenures ct JOIN coaches c ON c.id = ct.coach_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = ct.team_id JOIN seasons s ON ct.start_date <= s.end_date AND ct.end_date >= s.start_date WHERE t.name = 'Heilbronner Falken' AND s.label = '2022/23' AND ct.role = 'Headcoach';

results.question: Wer war Trainer der Heilbronner Falken in der Saison 2022/23?
results.actual_answer: Trainer der Heilbronner Falken in der Saison 2022/23 waren Jason Morgan und Martin Jiranek. Beide waren vom 2022-09-01 bis zum 2023-05-31 als Headcoach tätig.
results.sql: SELECT c.name, ct.role, ct.start_date, ct.end_date FROM coach_tenures ct JOIN coaches c ON c.id = ct.coach_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = ct.team_id JOIN seasons s ON ct.start_date <= s.end_date AND ct.end_date >= s.start_date WHERE t.name = 'Heilbronner Falken' AND s.label = '2022/23' AND ct.role = 'Headcoach';

results.question: Wer war Trainer der Heilbronner Falken in der Saison 2021/22?
results.actual_answer: Trainer der Heilbronner Falken in der Saison 2021/22 war Jason Morgan.
results.sql: SELECT c.name, ct.role, ct.start_date, ct.end_date FROM coach_tenures ct JOIN coaches c ON c.id = ct.coach_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = ct.team_id JOIN seasons s ON ct.start_date <= s.end_date AND ct.end_date >= s.start_date WHERE t.name = 'Heilbronner Falken' AND s.label = '2021/22' AND ct.role = 'Headcoach';

results.question: Wer war Trainer der Heilbronner Falken in der Saison 2020/21?
results.actual_answer: Trainer der Heilbronner Falken in der Saison 2020/21 waren Michel Zeiter und William-Bill Stewart.
